selected_round.impact: Runtime M1 已能观察和干预 Codex app-server turn，但验证结果仍不能自动、安全地转化为 project、iteration 和 case ledger 写回。
selected_round.round_goal: 实现 Gate Engine 与 ledger writeback，验证无效结果不会写回。
stop_conditions: Stop if source facts are unknown and the requested change would only update a projection.
Stop if validation cannot prove progress against the selected state gap.
Stop if the turn would require destructive or cross-workspace actions.

runtime_result.summary: Implemented M2 Gate Engine and controlled ledger writeback for Arckit Runtime.

deferred_projections: Real Codex supervised turn transcript after user explicitly triggers it
Supervisor UI/TUI interaction spec if the CLI control surface becomes a product UI

loop_handoff.responsibility_reason: M2 gate/writeback is implemented; the next agent-continuable step is to run a real supervised Codex turn when explicitly triggered.
loop_handoff.next_prompt: 继续 active case CASE-20260707-002：使用 arckit-runtime run --adapter codex-app-server --stream-events --supervise-stdin 执行一次真实 supervised Codex turn，保存 transcript/result，并验证 steer/interrupt 行为。

agent_instruction.goal: 验证真实 Codex supervised turn transcript 与 steer/interrupt 行为。
required_actions: Run one explicitly-triggered Codex app-server supervised turn.
Capture event stream and runtime result.
Validate result and decide whether to close the active case or continue to opencode/multi-agent adapter.
agent_instruction.stop_condition: Stop after one supervised turn transcript is validated, or if Codex app-server cannot run without additional user authorization.

progress_guard.expected_state_change: A real Codex supervised turn transcript proves the runtime loop beyond dry-run/writeback tests.
progress_guard.actual_state_change: M2 implemented gate-result and write-ledger with invalid-result rejection and allowed dry-run writeback plan.
